name: aggregate_claim_features
description: Aggregate Stage 1 features from all documents into final actuarial variables for reserving, ratemaking, and claim management

actuarial_variables.description: Final actuarial variables aggregated from all Stage 1 features. Rationale fields with conflict resolution injected if enabled.

reserving_variables.description: Variables for reserving and ultimate cost prediction

claim_severity.description: Final claim severity classification aggregated from all sources

injury_severity.description: Clinical severity of the injury based on medical assessment

medical_complexity.description: Overall medical treatment COMPLEXITY level (NOT treatment type). Simple=straightforward care, Moderate=standard protocols, Complex=surgical/specialists, Highly_Complex=chronic/permanent disability care

treatment_type.description: Primary treatment approach for the injury

expected_development_pattern.description: Expected claim development timeline and pattern for actuarial modeling and loss reserving

ultimate_cost_category.description: Categorical range of ultimate claim cost for loss development modeling

total_incurred_cost.description: Total costs paid and incurred to date in dollars

estimated_outstanding_cost.description: Estimated future costs to be incurred from current date until claim closure in dollars

ultimate_cost_prediction.description: Final predicted total claim cost including all medical, indemnity, and administrative expenses in dollars

permanent_disability_rating.description: Permanent partial or total disability rating if assessed (percentage)

recovery_timeline_days.description: Estimated or actual recovery period in days

maximum_medical_improvement_reached.description: Whether claimant has reached maximum medical improvement

total_medical_costs.description: Total medical costs incurred (subset of total_incurred_cost) in dollars

total_indemnity_paid.description: Total indemnity/wage loss payments made in dollars

settlement_amount.description: Final settlement amount agreed upon (if claim settled) in dollars

reserve_adequacy.description: Assessment of whether reserves are adequate for expected costs

medical_provider_quality.description: Quality and appropriateness of medical care provided

ratemaking_variables.description: Variables for ratemaking and risk classification

risk_level.description: Overall risk level classification for ratemaking and pricing decisions

causation_type.description: Primary mechanism/cause of the injury or incident for risk classification and experience modification

industry_risk_category.description: Industry risk classification for experience rating and pricing

industry_risk_level.description: Risk level of work environment based on industry hazards and safety factors

safety_compliance.description: Level of safety protocol compliance observed or documented

experience_modifier_impact.description: Expected impact of this claim on employer's experience modification factor

employer_size_category.description: Size classification of employer for experience rating

claim_frequency_indicator.description: Indicator of whether this is a repeat claimant or high-frequency employer

claim_management_variables.description: Variables for claim handling and management strategy

litigation_risk.description: Assessed risk of claim proceeding to litigation

settlement_likelihood.description: Probability of claim reaching settlement agreement vs. prolonged litigation

management_complexity.description: Level of complexity in managing and handling the claim

fraud_risk.description: Assessed risk of fraudulent claim elements

time_to_closure_days.description: Estimated or actual number of days from incident to claim closure

recommended_reserve.description: Recommended case reserve amount based on all available information in dollars

work_relatedness_status.description: Official determination of whether injury is work-related and compensable under workers' compensation

return_to_work_status.description: Claimant's current or projected return to work status

claim_closure_status.description: Current status of claim (open, closed, settled, denied)

subrogation_potential.description: Potential for subrogation recovery from third parties

claimant_cooperation_level.description: Level of claimant cooperation throughout claim process

aggregated_narrative.description: Comprehensive narrative summary (1000-2000 characters) that: (1) Synthesizes all Stage 1 analyses, (2) Explains key findings and their actuarial significance, (3) Identifies any conflicts found and how they were resolved, (4) Provides recommendations for claim handling, (5) Highlights key risk factors and cost drivers

confidence_scores.description: Confidence scores for different variable categories

overall.description: Overall confidence in final aggregated analysis

reserving.description: Confidence in reserving variables and cost predictions

ratemaking.description: Confidence in ratemaking and risk classification variables

data_completeness.description: Completeness of input data (1.0 = all key documents present)
